_comment: Sun Home Eclipse 2 DP map, reverse-engineered live in Phase 1 (2026-06-20). Device identity (devId/localKey/ip) lives in the gitignored options.json, not here.

power.note: MOMENTARY TOGGLE: a write FLIPS power regardless of the value sent (a button press, not a level — in Phase 1 we only ever sent the opposite value so it looked like a level). Drive by desired state: read status from DP20, write only when it must change, else an already-on Start toggles the unit OFF. Interior LED comes on with power.

heater.note: MOMENTARY TOGGLE like power: a write flips the heater. Read DP114 for state; write only when it must change. The core heat control.

target_temp_f.note: Target setpoint in Fahrenheit. Firmware may clamp out-of-range values.

timer_set_min.note: Session duration. Writing it resets timer_remaining (105).

interior_lights.note: Interior-lights master OVER LAN (2026-06-21): a network write to DP113 toggles ALL interior lights (ceiling chroma + footwell) together. The panel's dedicated footwell button also flips DP113 but only affects the footwell (hardware), so there is NO footwell-only control via the API. Chroma color (DP21) only renders while this is on. App exposes it as the 'Interior' toggle (state field still named 'footwell' internally — rename pending).

chromo_color.note: Interior ceiling LED color, mapped 2026-06-21 via the in-app debug screen. ONLY the 7 values above are solid colors; mode1 is a no-op and mode8/mode9 read back as white. The panel's color-button cycle order is NOT the same as the DP value order (that mismatch caused earlier confusion). Color only renders while interior lights (DP113) are on; the slow rainbow is DP101.

chromo_cycle.note: Slow morphing rainbow on the ceiling LED (mapped 2026-06-21). true=on; turning it off resets the LED to white (mode). Distinct from the panel's abrupt color-cycle scene, which maps to no DP we use (ignored as useless).

power_status.note: Canonical power on/off STATUS (read-only) — the real power state. DP110 is only the momentary toggle 'button'; read power from here. Lags a toggle by ~2s before settling.

111.note: Bluetooth audio volume (default 30). Vestigial — the cabin BT speaker is unused (audio is via the Sonos Amp), so writes have no audible effect. Ignore.

not_controllable.exterior_light: Panel-only — toggling it at the panel changed NO DP, and DP writes don't drive it. ember cannot switch the exterior light.
not_controllable.interior_on_off_separate_from_color: Chromo on/off appears scene/power-tied rather than a clean bool; control color via DP21 and the unit via power.
